title: Cirkus
subTitle: Two sets of identical twins are separated at birth and grow in two different cities. Years later, chaos ensues when one set of twins decides to visit the town where the other runs a circus.

title: Police Aur Mujrim
subTitle: After DSP Vishal arrests two thugs, their boss kidnaps the commissioner's daughter. But after Vishal rescues the girl and jails the thugs, they return to hurt Vishal and the commissioner's families.

title: Pukar
subTitle: Major Jaidev saves a politician from the clutches of a dreaded terrorist. However, the terrorist joins hands with his childhood friend Anjali to ruin his life.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Bomb Blast
subTitle: Jai Kishen is an aspiring police officer who marries his girlfriend against his parents' wishes. Meanwhile, MLA Sadakhare hires a few men to carry out a bomb blast.

title: Zee Bollywood
subTitle: A gangster's driver takes the blame for an accident, leaving his family alone. He seeks revenge when he finds out what happened to them while he was gone.

title: Haathkadi
subTitle: ACP Suraj, an honest policeman, swears revenge on culprits when his innocent brother is killed. However, he is soon accused of murder and is remanded to prison.

title: Biwi Ho To Aisi
subTitle: Suraj secretly marries Shalu, a village belle, against his domineering mother Kamla's wishes. In a bid to get rid of Shalu, Kamla frames her and accuses her of stealing jewellery and money.

title: Khiladiyon Ka Khiladi
subTitle: A man comes to America in order to find his brother who is wanted by the police. But his search forces him to get mixed up with a lady gangster that facilitates illegal underground fights.

title: Naseeb
subTitle: The lives of friends Namdev, Raghu, Damu and Jaggi take a turn for the worse when they win a lottery. Raghu and Damu murder Jaggi and frame Namdev who later returns to seek revenge.

title: Lal Baadshah
subTitle: Lal Singh, a righteous and helpful man, clashes against Dayal Singh, a powerful personality. However, things get complicated when a hidden treasure is involved and Lal's tragic past is disclosed.

title: Lal Baadshah
subTitle: Lal Singh, a righteous and helpful man, clashes against Dayal Singh, a powerful personality. However, things get complicated when a hidden treasure is involved and Lal's tragic past is disclosed.

title: Prithviraj Chauhan
subTitle: Prithviraj Chauhan, a great ruler, strives to overcome multiple challenges in order to defeat his enemies and ensure peace in his kingdom.

title: Ghajini
subTitle: Suffering from memory loss every 15 minutes, a heartbroken man uses photographs, notes and tattoos to keep reminding himself to punish his lady-love's murderer.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Sahibaan
subTitle: After being rejected by Sahibaan, Vijay, a philanderer, learns about her love affair with Gopi, a labourer. Soon, a distressed Vijay decides to kill Gopi.

title: Baazigar
subTitle: A cold-blooded killer with a vendetta charms a businessman's elder daughter and then kills her in a way that would make it seem like a case of suicide. He then plots to destroy the rest of the family.

title: Sabse Bada Khiladi
subTitle: Inspector Vijay infiltrates a rich businessman's family to investigate the death of his twin brother and exact revenge on the murderer.

title: Ram Teri Ganga Maili
subTitle: When Ganga's husband abandons her, she embarks on a journey to Calcutta to find him and ensure her son has a better future. But she is cheated and forced to work in a brothel.

title: Koyla
subTitle: Silenced by a piece of smouldering coal in childhood, Shankar endures a life of slavery until love compels him to seek his voice, freedom, and long-overdue revenge.

title: Tirangaa
subTitle: Brigadier Suryadev Singh and Shivajirao Waghle, a police inspector, work together to track down a terrorist who plans to evade India.

title: Mission Raniganj
subTitle: Jaswant Singh Gill, a mining engineer, leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.

title: Mission Raniganj
subTitle: Jaswant Singh Gill, a mining engineer, leads a challenging rescue mission to save 65 miners trapped in a flooded coal mine.

title: Maseeha
subTitle: Krishna, a victim of the local gangster Surajbhan's atrocities, joins forces with Shiva, whose parents were killed upon Surajbhan's orders, and resolves to bring him down.

title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
subTitle: Three friends, orphaned by an evil man, set out to take revenge for their father's murders. They are forced to navigate a complex web of deceit and stolen identities before they can reach their goal.

title: Kabzaa
subTitle: Ravi works for Veljibhai Soda, a gangster, and does illegal work for him. Once, he is asked to vacate Ali from his property, but he gets inspired by his ideals and decides to change his ways.

title: Baazigar
subTitle: A cold-blooded killer with a vendetta charms a businessman's elder daughter and then kills her in a way that would make it seem like a case of suicide. He then plots to destroy the rest of the family.

title: Vanvaas
subTitle: After being abandoned by his sons, an elderly father grappling with dementia embarks on a life-changing journey. He is aided by a cunning thief who is determined to reunite him with his family.

title: Hero No. 1
subTitle: Rajesh and Meena intend to marry each other, but her grandfather disapproves of their relationship. Soon, he poses himself as a servant and enters her home to try and win the approval of her loved one's using his wit and talent.

title: Loafer
subTitle: Ravi, an unemployed man who constantly gets into fights, is framed for the murder of a gangster. With no support from his family, he must now fight to prove his innocence.

title: Loha
subTitle: After a bid to arrest Sher Singh fails, officer Dayal is crippled and his partner Amar's career is sabotaged. When Amar gets another chance to nab Sher Singh, he hires two crooks for the job.

title: Vijaypath
subTitle: When a criminal is sentenced to death by Saxena, the gangster's brother, takes revenge by killing the judge's family and his driver. Later, the driver's son embarks on a vengeful quest.
